brand.headline: Measure and manage your company's carbon footprint.
brand.tagline: Calculate your Scope 1, 2 and 3 emissions and see them in a clear dashboard.

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Register your company to calculate its carbon footprint.
register.checkEmailBody: We sent a confirmation link to {email}. Open it to activate your account.

forgot.title: Reset password
forgot.subtitle: We'll email you a link to reset it.
forgot.sentBody: If an account exists for {email}, you'll receive a link to reset your password.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.

errors.emailInUse: An account with this email already exists.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

toasts.registerCheckEmail: Account created. Check your email to confirm.

onboarding.title: Set up your company
onboarding.subtitle: Create your company and its first facility to start calculating your carbon footprint.

errors.alreadyOnboarded: You already have a company set up.
errors.generic: Could not create the company. Please try again.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of your company's carbon footprint.
dashboard.emptyBody: Record your source consumption under Data entry and your calculated footprint will appear here.

facilities.title: Facilities
facilities.subtitle: A facility is a plant at a location. Reporting years are recorded per facility.
facilities.dialogSubtitle: The plant and its location identify the facility within the company.
facilities.name: Plant
facilities.emptyBody: Add your first facility to start recording consumption.
facilities.yearCount: {count, plural, =0 {No reporting years} =1 {# reporting year} other {# reporting years}}

deleteDialog.title: Delete this facility?
deleteDialog.body: The facility {name} will be removed. This cannot be undone.

errors.facilityExists: A facility with that name already exists in this company.
errors.facilityHasYears: You cannot delete a facility that has reporting years. Remove its years first.
errors.forbidden: You do not have access to this company.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

dataEntry.title: Data entry
dataEntry.subtitle: Record consumption for each source, by scope. Changes save themselves.
dataEntry.emptyScope: The factor library has no categories for this scope yet.

category.notApplicable: Marked as not applicable. Turn it on to record sources.
category.lockedBySources: To mark it as not applicable, remove its sources first.
category.noSources: No sources added in this category yet.

deleteDialog.title: Delete this source?
deleteDialog.body: The recorded values for {element} will be removed. This cannot be undone.

year.gwpNote: The {gwp} GWP set will be used.

gridFactor.missing: There is no grid electricity factor for {year} yet. You can record consumption; emissions will be calculated once an administrator loads the factor.

empty.noFacilityBody: You need at least one facility to record consumption.
empty.noYearBody: Create a reporting year for {facility} and start recording consumption.

validation.valueFormat: Enter a non-negative number with up to 6 decimals.
validation.yearMin: That year is too far in the past.
validation.yearMax: That year is too far in the future.

errors.forbidden: You do not have access to this data.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.invalidValue: One of the values is not valid. Check the highlighted field.
errors.yearExists: That facility already has that reporting year.
errors.factorUnavailable: That element is no longer available in the factor library.
errors.categoryHasSources: Remove the category's sources before marking it as not applicable.

companies.title: Companies
companies.subtitle: Manage companies and work on their data when they need it.
companies.emptyBody: Companies appear here once they register and complete their setup.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Accounts with access to the platform.

factors.title: Factor library
factors.subtitle: Emission factors and their version history.
factors.loaded: Loaded: {factors} active factors, {gridFactors} grid electricity factors. Latest version: {version}.
